mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories (id, organization_id, name, description, color, created_at) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{name}, #{description}, #{color}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, organization_id, name, description, color, created_at FROM categories WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at DESC
